司令官様、いらしてたんですね。<br>最近、こちらで私も治療のお手伝いをすること:
Lord Commander, you have come. I have recently begun assisting with
the treatments here as well.
大抵の病気の原因は“気”の乱れが原因。<br>それを整えてあげるだけでお身体はす:
Most illnesses are caused by a disruption in ki. By simply realigning it
for you, your body will quickly recover.
あの……司令官様はいつも皆さんのことを気にかけていらっしゃいますよね。<br>…:
Um... Lord Commander, you are always so concerned about everyone...
Perhaps that is why you seem tired—I sense a slight ki disturbance.
司令官様は、この基地の要です。決して無理はしないでくださいね。<br>司令官様が:
Lord Commander, you are this base's keystone. Do not overwork. If
you are unwell, everyone's ki becomes disordered too.
あとで司令本部に、心を込めて作った特製の薬膳恵方巻をお届けしますね！ <br>し:
I will bring you a special medicinal ehomaki made with all my heart to
Command HQ later! Please eat well and stay healthy, Lord Commander.
